Interface JdbcChatMemoryRepositoryDialect

All Known Implementing Classes:
H2ChatMemoryRepositoryDialect, HsqldbChatMemoryRepositoryDialect, MysqlChatMemoryRepositoryDialect, OracleChatMemoryRepositoryDialect, PostgresChatMemoryRepositoryDialect, SqliteChatMemoryRepositoryDialect, SqlServerChatMemoryRepositoryDialect
public interface JdbcChatMemoryRepositoryDialect
Abstraction for database-specific SQL for chat memory repository.

    static JdbcChatMemoryRepositoryDialect
    from(DataSource dataSource)
    Detects the dialect from the DataSource.
    default String
    getDeleteMessagesSql()
    Returns the SQL to delete all messages for a conversation.
    default String
    getInsertMessageSql()
    Returns the SQL to insert a message.
    default String
    getSelectConversationIdsSql()
    Returns the SQL to fetch conversation IDs.
    default String
    getSelectMessagesSql()
    Returns the SQL to fetch messages for a conversation, ordered by sequence id.

    • getSelectMessagesSql

      default String getSelectMessagesSql()

      Returns the SQL to delete all messages for a conversation.
